backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four UI change features (footer tagline removal, selection counter translation, and heading font/style alignment) to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file describing their purpose and current state.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom properties for a light/dark color theme using OKLCH values for backgrounds, foregrounds, and UI component tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Dim Sum Food Orders Landing Page' that mounts the app into a root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages order state (add, update quantity, clear) and composes Hero, Menu, OrderForm, Footer, and Toaster components.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying SUMOJI branding, DKI Jakarta address, phone number, and a caffeine.ai attribution link — with the tagline text removed.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a dim sum background image, SUMOJI heading, 'Steam. Snap. Repeat.' tagline, and an 'Order Now' button that scrolls to the menu.
frontend/src/components/Menu.tsx: Menu section rendering three dim sum items with ingredient checkboxes, quantity controls, and an 'Our Menu' heading styled as a pill badge; Porsian selection counter uses 'selected' in English.
frontend/src/components/OrderForm.tsx: Order form section with a cart summary, contact details inputs, QRIS payment confirmation, and order submission; 'Place Your Order' heading uses large h2 styling (text-4xl/5xl) matching the Menu heading size.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file; no backend queries are implemented since all order data is stored locally in the browser.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm cream/red/gold theme in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/formatCurrency.ts: Exports a single utility function that formats a number as Indonesian Rupiah currency string (e.g., 'Rp. 17.500,-').
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends border radius and animations, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, existing features, and pending UI refinement requests (footer text removal, label translation, heading font size/style alignment) for the dim sum ordering app.
